action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 11 completed successfully after ~4.4 hours of training (30M timesteps) with the enhanced architecture (8-frame stack, ent_coef=0.03, gamma=0.995, n_steps=8192, batch_size=1024, SubprocVecEnv). The model was saved to checkpoints/iter_11/ppo_minigrid.zip. The previous best success rate was 49.6% from iter_8 (15M steps). Analysis: Doubling training steps and increasing exploration entropy may have improved policy performance on the hard zero-success environments (KeyCorridor, LockedRoom, UnlockPickup, MultiRoom, FourRooms), or it may have caused instability. With only ~2.6 hours remaining, I cannot afford another long training run without first measuring iter_11's performance. Decision: Submit evaluation immediately for the iter_11 checkpoint to see if the 30M-step run improved upon the 49.6% baseline.
